subject: feat(builder): wire form create, publish, and share lifecycle
body:
New forms are now created via POST /api/forms on first save, with the
URL updating from /forms/new to /forms/:id without remounting. Existing
forms are loaded from the API so slug, status, and title are available.
Added publish/unpublish buttons (desktop + mobile) that toggle status
via PUT. A green "Live" banner shows the public URL with copy-link when
published. Embed code now uses the real form slug instead of the route
param ID. Title rename persists to the API instead of only updating the
local store.

Tags: forms, publish, share, lifecycle, builder
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: form-lifecycle
Semver: minor

title: wire form create, publish, and share lifecycle
